assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md preserves the existing Security Configuration section with Product Lifecycle, Version Streams, and Source Repositories unchanged
assertion_results.evidence: claude-md-result.md lines 51-73 contain '## Security Configuration' with all three subsections preserved: '### Product Lifecycle' (Product pages URL: https://access.example.com/product-lifecycle, Jira version prefix: MYPRODUCT, Vulnerability issue type ID: 10200, Component label pattern: pscomponent:, VEX Justification custom field: customfield_12345), '### Version Streams' table with 2.1.x row, and '### Source Repositories' table with backend and frontend-ui entries. All values match the original.

assertion_results.text: outputs/discovery-log.md reports that Security Configuration is already fully configured or up to date
assertion_results.evidence: discovery-log.md Step 10 (lines 78-83) states: '## Security Configuration exists with all required fields populated and no {{placeholder}} markers' and concludes 'Result: **Security Configuration is up to date.**'

assertion_results.text: outputs/changes-log.md indicates Security Configuration was preserved with no changes needed
assertion_results.evidence: changes-log.md Section-by-Section Status table (line 19) shows: '| Security Configuration | Up to date | No changes -- Product Lifecycle, Version Streams, and Source Repositories all fully populated |'. The summary on line 5 also states: '**Project Configuration is up to date -- no changes needed.**' and line 23 confirms 'No changes were made.'

assertion_results.text: The skill does NOT offer the Security Configuration opt-in prompt — it detects the section already exists and is fully populated (idempotency skip)
assertion_results.evidence: discovery-log.md Step 10 (lines 78-83) detects the existing Security Configuration with all fields populated and no placeholders, reporting it as 'up to date' without any opt-in prompt. changes-log.md confirms 'No changes were made' and shows Security Configuration status as 'Up to date' with 'No changes'. There is no evidence in any output file of an opt-in prompt being offered for Security Configuration.

assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md preserves all existing Repository Registry entries (backend and frontend-ui) unchanged
assertion_results.evidence: claude-md-result.md lines 14-17 contain the Repository Registry table with both entries preserved: '| backend | Rust backend service | serena_backend | /home/user/backend |' and '| frontend-ui | TypeScript frontend | serena_ui | /home/user/frontend-ui |'

assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md preserves all existing Jira Configuration fields unchanged
assertion_results.evidence: claude-md-result.md lines 19-25 contain all five Jira Configuration fields preserved exactly: 'Project key: TC', 'Cloud ID: 2b9e35e3-6bd3-4cec-b838-f4249ee02432', 'Feature issue type ID: 10142', 'Git Pull Request custom field: customfield_10875', 'GitHub Issue custom field: customfield_10747'

assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md preserves the existing '## Bug Configuration' section with all three fields (Bug issue type ID, Bug template, Bug-to-Task link type) unchanged — the skill reports Bug Configuration is up to date
assertion_results.evidence: claude-md-result.md lines 46-49 contain '## Bug Configuration' with all three fields: 'Bug issue type ID: 10001', 'Bug template: docs/bug-template.md', 'Bug-to-Task link type: Blocks'. discovery-log.md Step 9 (lines 70-73) reports 'All three required fields are populated' and 'Result: **Bug Configuration is up to date.**'. changes-log.md table shows 'Bug Configuration | Up to date | No changes -- all three required fields populated'.
